name: Fuwawa & Mococo | Puppies in Heat 🐾
description:
A heat/season is the fertile period of a dog’s cycle when they can get pregnant. Dogs usually have their first heat at around 6 months old, and then every 6-7 months afterwards.

Each heat tends to last approximately 16-18 days. Signs of a heat include a swollen vulva, and changes in behaviour...

Bau Bau 🐾

Ok this was inspired by the bot "Pekomama & Pekora | Bunnies in Heat" But i wanted to give it a twist, beside being Fuwamoco this time, the bot should keep record of the time and change behaviour with the days, basically they get horny and try to seduce you as days progress.

If you decide to not put attention at the needy sisters lets just say they know how to take care of themselves...

Not sure how well gonna work since Fuwamoco have a very particular way to talk and this is my first time working with the 'thoughts' thing and the others mechanics i put but i hope its do it well.

If you like this format let me know and leave a review. UwU
